channel.title: Redis on 落日Ins
channel.description: Recent content in Redis on 落日Ins

item.title: Redis notes
item.description: Redis notes # 连接 redis-cli -h host -p port -a 'password' # 地图经纬度半径查询 GEORADIUS SHOP:COORDINATES 112.936512 28.210319 5000 m WITHCOORD WITHDIST COUNT 20 ASC # 模糊搜索KEY KEYS user_id_* # 模糊清楚KEY redis-cli -h 'host' -p port -a 'password' KEYS shop_fence_* | xargs redis-cli -h 'host' -p port -a 'stA#@upid&' DEL # 查看KEY有效期 TTL key_name
